---
title: "06_evaluation"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# PURPOSE: Aggregate all model results, produce final comparison tables and plots
# ASSIGNED TO: Person 3 and Person 4 (joint)
# DEPENDS ON: outputs from 03, 04, 05

# DELIVERABLES:
# - Table 1: RMSE across 5 models x 3 horizons
# - Table 2: MAE across 5 models x 3 horizons
# - Table 3: R-squared
# - Table 4: Directional Accuracy
# - Figure 1: Feature importance - RF
# - Figure 2: Feature importance - XGBoost
# - Figure 3: Predicted vs Actual (best model)
# - Overfitting comparison: train vs test RMSE per model

```{r main}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

message("06_evaluation.R: Not yet implemented.")
```
